risks.description: A static scaffold may later be mistaken for a live route.
risks.mitigation: Keep AG26C and AG26D records marked static/no-live-route and require AG26Z closure before later UI work.

risks.description: Editor scope could drift into independent article creation or global browse.
risks.mitigation: Preserve AG26A assignment alignment and AG26D role-separation audit.

risks.description: Planned publish actions could be misunderstood as executable.
risks.mitigation: Keep Publish and Publish-and-close as disabled/plan-only until separately approved controlled path.

risks.description: Admin/Editor workflow may tempt backend/Auth activation.
risks.mitigation: AG27 backend deferral remains source-of-truth; AG28 remains blocked pending explicit approval.
